text: Should the Spurs should Miami go for the three right away? Just attack the basket. James catches, puts up a three. Won't go. Rebound. Bosh back out to Allen. His three-pointer. Timeout. Time game with five seconds remaining. Spurs do not have a timeout. But the officials are going to review to see if Allen was behind the line. Chris Bosh with the huge offensive rebound. And now instant replay enormous. And Mike Tim Duncan out of the game leads to the second shot and clearly a three-point shot. They confirm that it was a three. And the Spurs had a chance to talk this over.
